mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM bookmark WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
AND (url LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
AND tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tagName}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM bookmark WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookmark WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0
